emails.subject: [DISCUSS] Add DataFrame.mapInArrow for Connect
emails.body:
Hi all,

I'd like to propose adding mapInArrow support to the Connect API. This would allow users to apply Arrow-based UDFs directly through the Connect interface, mirroring the existing mapInPandas functionality.

The main benefits are:
1. Better performance for large datasets
2. Consistent API surface between local and Connect modes

Thoughts?

emails.subject: Re: [DISCUSS] Add DataFrame.mapInArrow for Connect
emails.body: +1 on this proposal. We should also consider batching for large datasets to avoid memory issues on the Connect server side.

emails.subject: [VOTE] Release Apache Spark 4.1.0 RC1
emails.body: Please vote on the release of Apache Spark 4.1.0 RC1.
